hero.title: Share Your Knowledge!
hero.description: Four speakers. Fifteen minutes each. Any topic. Free events for curious minds in Munich.

whatIs.label: About Us
whatIs.title: What is 15x4?
whatIs.p1: 15x4 is a series of non-commercial science communication events happening in different countries around the world.
whatIs.p2: We organize free educational meetings featuring four popular science talks of fifteen minutes each.
whatIs.p3: Our goal is to promote science communication and make knowledge more approachable.

features.label: Get Involved
features.title: Four Ways to Join
features.learnDesc: Discover fascinating topics from passionate speakers, completely free.
features.speakDesc: Share your knowledge and develop public speaking skills in a supportive environment.
features.volunteerDesc: Join our international team of driven volunteers who believe in knowledge sharing.
features.partnerDesc: Collaborate with us to reach an audience of science enthusiasts and tech lovers.

cta.title: Ready to Share Your Knowledge?
cta.description: Whether you want to give a talk, attend an event, or help organize, there is a place for you at 15x4 Munich.

about.heroDescription: A global movement making knowledge accessible through short, engaging talks.
about.speakersDesc: Each event features four speakers who are passionate about their topic. No academic credentials required -- just enthusiasm and curiosity.
about.minutesDesc: Each talk is exactly 15 minutes. This constraint forces speakers to distill complex ideas into clear, engaging presentations.
about.costDesc: All events are completely free. Knowledge should be accessible to everyone, with no barriers to entry.
about.topicsDesc: From quantum physics to cooking, from history to AI. Any topic is welcome as long as the speaker is passionate about it.
about.storyP1: 15x4 started as a grassroots science communication initiative and has grown into a global network with chapters in multiple countries.
about.storyP2: The Munich chapter was founded in 2017 by a group of science enthusiasts who wanted to bring this format to the city. After hosting many events and building a wonderful community, we are now being revived in 2026 with fresh energy and new ideas.
about.storyP3: Our mission remains the same: make knowledge sharing

events.heroDescription: Every Wednesday at 8 PM at Buena Vista. Join us for an evening of curiosity, learning, and great conversations.
events.followUs: Follow us on social media to be the first to know!

contact.heroDescription: Want to speak, attend, volunteer, or partner? We would love to hear from you.
contact.becomeASpeakerDesc: Share your passion in a 15-minute talk.
contact.volunteerWithUsDesc: Help organize events, design, or manage social media.
contact.partnerWithUsDesc: Provide a venue, sponsor, or collaborate.
contact.generalInquiryDesc: Questions, feedback, or just saying hello.

footer.description: Free educational events with four 15-minute talks on any topic. Knowledge should be accessible to everyone.
